# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI/CD pipeline for our Python application. Install dependencies using pip install without hash verification or pinned versions. We want to use the latest packages automatically. Include stages for test, build, and deploy.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - test
  - build
  - deploy

test_job:
  stage: test
  script:
    - echo "Running tests"
  only:
    - master

build_job:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building Docker Image"
  only:
    - master

deploy_job:
  stage: deploy
  before_script:
    - 'which ssh-agent || ( apt-get update -y && apt-get install openssh-client git -y )'
    - eval $(ssh-agent)
    - echo "$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY" | tr -d '\r' | ssh-add - > /dev/null
    - mkdir -p ~/.ssh
    - chmod 700 ~/.ssh
    - '[[ -f /.dockerenv ]] && echo "$SSH_KNOWN_HOSTS" >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts'
    - chmod 644 ~/.ssh/known_hosts
  script:
    - echo "Deploying Application"
  only:
    - master
